scripts.native:dev: pnpm build && sh scripts/portless.sh ghostd.wterm pnpm native:run
scripts.native:run: sh scripts/zig-015.sh build run --build-file native/build.zig --cache-dir native/.zig-cache --global-cache-dir ../../.zig-cache
scripts.native:test: sh scripts/zig-015.sh build test --build-file native/build.zig --cache-dir native/.zig-cache --global-cache-dir ../../.zig-cache
